description: A DHS-designed quote-card graphic. The top two-thirds is a color photograph of Secretary Kristi Noem standing in front of the massive concrete signage of El Salvador's CECOT mega-prison; behind her the wall reads 'CECOT' in giant gray letters and 'CENTRO DE CONFINAMIENTO DEL TERRORISMO' beneath. Noem wears a navy ball cap with a gold DHS badge, a white long-sleeve top, and looks off to the side with a stern expression. A red horizontal divider separates the photo from a navy-blue lower panel containing a white bold-serif pull quote: '“President Trump and I have a clear message to criminal illegal aliens: LEAVE NOW. If you do not leave, we will hunt you down, arrest you, and you could end up in this El Salvadoran prison.”' Below a short white rule it is attributed to 'Secretary Kristi Noem / U.S. Department of Homeland Security,' with the white DHS seal in the lower-left. The card uses an intimidating foreign maximum-security prison as a backdrop and an explicit threat ('we will hunt you down') as a deterrence/scare-tactic propaganda technique aimed at undocumented immigrants and the public. Target audience: undocumented immigrants (deterrence) and administration supporters.
notable_text: CECOT — CENTRO DE CONFINAMIENTO DEL TERRORISMO; “President Trump and I have a clear message to criminal illegal aliens: LEAVE NOW. If you do not leave, we will hunt you down, arrest you, and you could end up in this El Salvadoran prison.”; Secretary Kristi Noem, U.S. Department of Homeland Security
